title: Usulután Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Usulután, with a Z-Score of +3.57. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Usulután is characterized by high temperatures and high humidity, with an average relative humidity of 74%. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.5 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The wind speed is relatively low, at 0.6 km/h, which can exacerbate the heat island effect in urban areas, making the situation even more critical.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect the population and infrastructure.
